name: OpenClaw Evolution OS
description: Host integration adapter for agent-evolution-os runtime hooks.

evolutionReviewBin.description: Command used to run evolution-review. Defaults to evolution-review on PATH.

autoBeforeTask.description: Future typed-hook integration: run before-task automatically. Default false in scaffold.

autoAfterTask.description: Future typed-hook integration: run after-task automatically. Default false in scaffold.

writeCandidate.description: Allow after-task to write safe candidates. High-risk writes remain blocked.
